current_objective: 继续推进 Scholar AI / 文献助手 MCP-first 研究工作流主干，把研究流程从“任务记录可审计”收口为“流程可复验、证据可定位、风险可阻断、交接可恢复、工作区可见、知识可按需进入模型上下文”的本地研究系统。当前执行主线合并为三条：1) 研究工作流主干：完成 N33 / research-action lifecycle crosslinks，把研究动作生命周期轻量引用接入 Workflow Passport、Evidence Integrity Gate、BlockingAction、Agent Handoff Cards，并核查 runtime 链接真实存在、不 404、只读、可恢复、可审计。2) Knowledge Runtime Pipeline：把 wiki、官方文档、学术英文知识、项目文献切片统一收口到 authoritative source -> builder/loader/chunker -> runtime artifact -> manifest/provenance/hash -> searchable ref/resource -> bounded context -> QA/agent 实际加载 -> audit/test proof，完成标准是证明知识真的进入运行时和模型上下文。3) OCR 与本地处理能力：推进 OCR auto policy 与 OcrEngine Protocol，默认 LITASSIST_OCR_POLICY=auto，PDF ingestion 按文本型、扫描型、混合型智能触发；支持 PaddleOCR GPU 本机私有运行时、RapidOCR、Remote API、Windows OCR；公开代码和文档可包含接入方式、配置、health check、mock 测试，但不提交 venv、模型缓存、API key 或运行时产物。执行时加载 Ponytail：优先复用本仓库已有路径、少写代码、根因位置修、边界验证不能省；创造性功能实现可不受 Ponytail 简化约束但仍必须保持全局设计质量。所有 squad/Codex subagent 必须继承父 Codex/API 会话模型；不得设置 per-agent model、model override、defaultModel、agentModelOverrides 或 named fallback chain。
not_the_objective: 不是单一短期切片完成声明；不是上传、部署、发布、tag、push；不是 Feishu/Lark；不是直接写入、修复、下载、重链 Zotero DB；不是修改 github/ 引用仓库；不是复制、内嵌或移植 AGPL-3.0 PDFMathTranslate 代码；不是未经授权 stage/commit/push；不是把 stale/unharvested subagent 输出、端点字符串、文件存在、搜索命中或 deterministic contract 单独当作 live model loading proof；不是为 subagent 选择或回退到任何命名模型。

workspace_identity.current_direction: MCP-first local source checkout toolbox; research workflow spine built from typed backend contracts, read-only diagnostics, local artifacts, and Agent Workspace/MCP visibility.
workspace_identity.budget_note: 预算2亿 recorded as goal metadata only; it is not authorization for paid external services, publishing, uploads, or new credentials.

requirements.requirement: Repo-local JSON config knowledge must expose authoritative source, load status, manifest status, source/content hashes, update time, section records, warnings, and runtime consumers without changing runtime scoring semantics.
requirements.source: Knowledge Runtime Pipeline requirement for JSON/config assets to become runtime knowledge with source -> loader -> structured artifact -> manifest/provenance -> test proof.
requirements.evidence: literature_assistant/core/config_knowledge.py defines ScoringRulesSnapshot over literature_assistant/core/config/scoring_rules.json with package_id=config:scoring_rules, config_id=scoring_rules, source_path, source_hash, content_hash, loaded, manifest_loaded, load_status, updated_at, manifest, sections, warnings, and runtime_consumers. load_scoring_rules_snapshot() reads only the authoritative JSON source, bounds file size, canonicalizes content hash, exposes weights/thresholds/multipliers/goal_mapping as section chunks, and reports missing or invalid JSON as non-500 missing/invalid load state with warnings. tests/test_knowledge_router.py::test_scoring_rules_snapshot_hash_changes_with_source proves source/content hash changes when the source changes; tests/test_knowledge_router.py::test_scoring_rules_status_reports_missing_source_without_500 proves missing source remains observable instead of silently falling back.
requirements.residual_risk: The JSON config projection is read-only and intentionally does not alter the scoring runtime. Section spans are best-effort raw-text offsets rather than JSON parser token-accurate locators.

requirements.requirement: Scoring-rules JSON config knowledge must be searchable as bounded section refs and readable through the shared agent resource endpoint.
requirements.source: Knowledge Runtime Pipeline requirement for evidence/resource ref -> bounded context loading proof across QA/agent knowledge entrances.
requirements.evidence: config_knowledge.search_scoring_rules() rejects blank queries and invalid top_k, scores the four read-only config sections, and returns schema_version=scholar-ai-scoring-rules-knowledge-ref/v1 with ref_id=scoring_rules:section:<section_id>, read_endpoint, summary, score, rank, and provenance metadata. read_scoring_rules_resource() resolves section:<section_id> refs after agent_bridge_router strips the leading kind, and agent_bridge_router applies max_chars/cursor bounded resource responses. tests/test_knowledge_router.py::test_scoring_rules_status_search_and_read_expose_bounded_refs proves status/read/search endpoint shape; tests/test_knowledge_router.py::test_scoring_rules_search_result_is_readable_as_agent_resource and tests/test_agent_bridge_router.py::test_agent_bridge_resource_reader_reads_scoring_rules_ref prove search refs round-trip through /api/agent-bridge/resource/{ref_id} with truncation and metadata.
requirements.residual_risk: Search granularity is four top-level config sections, not field-level chunks. Directly calling read_scoring_rules_resource() with a full scoring_rules:... ref is outside its internal raw-ref contract because the bridge layer strips the kind first.
